code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut max_v = 0
  mut min_v = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if in_tok
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            if not have
              max_v = v
              min_v = v
              have = true
            else
              if v > max_v
                max_v = v
              end
              if v < min_v
                min_v = v
              end
            end
          when None
            panic("invalid integer: #{cur}")
          end
          cur = ""
          in_tok = false
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        in_tok = true
      end
    when None
      panic("unexpected")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      if not have
        max_v = v
        min_v = v
        have = true
      else
        if v > max_v
          max_v = v
        end
        if v < min_v
          min_v = v
        end
      end
    when None
      panic("invalid integer: #{cur}")
    end
  end
  if not have
    panic("no input")
  end
  println("max=#{max_v}")
  println("min=#{min_v}")
end
